reviews.评论: Team damaged and looked like it had been used
Very very small. Was disappointed in the size.
Kong is a good brand that I buy from regularly. The description said for large dogs. I expected a LARGE Kong toy, this is a small toy.
Didn’t have it more than 5 minutes, and he tore through it.
I received only one Kong.
The last two kongs I ordered had a weird powdery substance on them. It did not wash off returned both of them.
Standard kong toy at the normal price, no surprise
Product was not usable for us. The opening is too small to get the buddy butter out.... for the dog or me. (Tried hot water too) threw it away.
Didn‘t last an hour before it was in pieces. :(
It’s sturdy for a long time but the description has a mistake. In one spot it says it’s 4” long and another description says 3 1/2”. The 4” is wrong.
Wasn’t a pack of two as described.
The pictures are misleading. I thought this was a larger sized kong. It was veryyyy tiny
Only lasted 5 months. 🤨

The toy came in scuffed with some dirt along the bottom of it. It isn’t too hard to rub off with some effort though. Seems like it might’ve been thrown around, but not used as there’s no teeth marks or indents in it, just dirty.
My Coonhound chewed this up in two days.
My 10lb. 11 month old puppy (Malshi) destroyed this kong in less than 2 hours. I thought theses were supposed to be tough!
